sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this SNES action RPG

special_mechanics.name: Linear Motion Battle System (LMBS)
special_mechanics.description: Real-time 2D battle system where player directly controls main character (Cress) in real-time on a horizontally scrolling terrain that stretches wider than single screen. Party members are computer-controlled or set to passive/active modes.

special_mechanics.name: Aerial Movement (Arche Klein)
special_mechanics.description: Half-elf character Arche Klein can fly using a broomstick as both flight tool and weapon

tier_notes: Tier 2: Action RPG with real-time battle mechanics. No precise physics documentation available in accessible sources. Movement parameters are not separately documented as this is primarily a turn-based battle system game with real-time party member control, not a platformer or action game with detailed movement physics specification.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Tales of Phantasia (gameplay and battle system description)
